title: New Holgha
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:NewHolgha-TEA.png]] |name=New Holgha |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]''—Based on corresponding data for [[Shirb system]] |sector=[[Ciutric sector/Legends|Ciutric sector]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}—Based on corresponding data for [[Shirb system]] |system=[[Shirb system]] |coordinates=N-5 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora=[[Tree/Legends|Trees]] |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym=[[New Holghan]] |cities=[[Five Holy Cities]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] }} {{Quote|At least the New Republic can evacuate the next target before they show.''"
"''Yes. Let's see what happens at New Holgha.|[[Goran Beviin]] and Boba Fett discuss the upcoming Yuuzhan Vong attack|}} '''New Holgha''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Ciutric sector/Legends|Ciutric sector]], known for its [[Five Holy Cities]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was easily [[Battle of New Holgha|conquered]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong|invaders]] after the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], believing [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] intelligence on the upcoming attack to be untrustworthy, relocated New Holgha's defense force elsewhere. ==Description== New Holgha was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Shirb system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Located in the [[Ciutric sector/Legends|Ciutric sector]] of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]], it was linked to the [[Shaum Hii system/Legends|Shaum Hii]] and [[Vinsoth system/Legends|Vinsoth systems]] by the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]. Its surface featured [[Tree/Legends|tree]] cover. ==History== {{Quote|The New Republic didn't believe us. Well, maybe they'll believe us now.|[[Goran Beviin]] witnesses the attack on New Holgha|}} In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'', the events of which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places in between [[24 ABY/Legends|24]] and [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], dates the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of New Holgha|attack]] on New Holgha to three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the beginning of their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to 25 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. Therefore, the attack must also take place in 25 ABY. New Holgha was held by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] before it was [[Battle of New Holgha|attacked]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Although the [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalorian leader]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], had passed on intelligence to the New Republic citing the world as the Yuuzhan Vong's next target, the New Republic did not trust the source, as the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] were publicly allied with the Yuuzhan Vong. New Holgha was not evacuated, and its [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] was redeployed to the New Republic stronghold on the astronomical object [[Pedd Four]]. Following this, New Holgha's planetary defense [[Radar/Legends|radar]] was [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotaged]] [[Standard day/Legends|overnight]], and the world subsequently fell without significant resistance. Fett betrayed the Yuuzhan Vong as the invaders laid waste to New Holgha's [[Five Holy Cities]], and began passing future intelligence on the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extragalactic]] invaders to a more reliable source—the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Kubariet]], whom Fett and his [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|comrades]] rescued from a Yuuzhan Vong attack. Following the attack, the Shirb [[Star system/Legends|system]] became part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]], and remained under its control until the Yuuzhan Vong were [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|defeated]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. ==Inhabitants== {{Quote|They redeployed troops to defend Pedd Four. So they think we gave them misinformation.|Goran Beviin, on the New Republic's withdrawal of the New Holgha garrison|}} Inhabitants of the planet were known as [[New Holghan]]s. The New Republic stationed a garrison of [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] on New Holgha before moving it to Pedd Four prior to the Yuuzhan Vong conquest of the planet. ==Locations== New Holgha was home to the Five Holy Cities, for which it was famous.{{CSWECite|II|374|New Holgha}} The [[City/Legends|cities]] were based around a large marketplace and featured tall buildings. ==Behind the scenes== New Holgha first appeared in ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'', a [[2006]] [[eBook]] written by [[Karen Traviss]]. The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Shirb system, and therefore New Holgha, in grid square N-5. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of New Holgha}} *''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Neu-Holgha |es=Nuevo Holgha }} [[Category:Ciutric sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Celanon Spur|Shirb system]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong planets]]
